name: 16_both_at_boundary_just_passes
description: Magnitude exactly at boundary (inclusive pass) AND MC just below threshold (strict pass). Condition met; count increments.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -1.10 <= -1.0 - 0.10 = -1.10 is TRUE (inclusive). MC: 59.99 < 60.0 is TRUE (strict, but the gap is positive). Condition met. new_count = 2 + 1 = 3; hit = (3 >= 3) is True. This is the threshold crossing under tight boundary conditions, exercising both inequalities simultaneously.
